list.title: Rārangi Ngā Tikiti
list.searchPlaceholder: Rapua mā te ID Tikiti / Kaupeka

view.title: Tikiti {id}
view.subject: Kaupeka
view.emailDisabled: Kua ārai tō īmēra ({email}). Whakapā atu ki
view.allowServerAccess: Tuku InterServer ki te whakatika tūmau:
view.ipHelpText: Ki te puta mai te hononga mai i tētahi wāhitau IP ke. Hurihia tūāhuatia.
view.passwordEncrypted: Ka tiakina ngā kupuhipa i tētahi pātengi raraunga whakamuna ke.
view.isRootRestricted: Kei ārai ana te Pūtake SSH?
view.ticketClosed: Kua katia tēnei tikiti, nā reira kua ārai ngā whakautu. Ki te hiahia tonu ana koe ki te āwhina, whakatuwhera ana i tētahi tikiti hou ā ka harikoa mātou ki te āwhina.
view.replyHint: Ko te waihanga o ngā tikiti motuhake mō ngā take hou e āwhina ana i tō mātou rōpū ki te whakaarotahi ā otaota i tere ake.
view.userLikedReply: I pai te kaiwhakamahi ki tō whakautu
view.userDislikedReply: Kāore te kaiwhakamahi i pai ki tō whakautu
view.closeConfirmText: Ka hiahia ana koe ki te katia tēnei tikiti?

new.title: Tikiti Hou
new.subject: Kaupeka
new.subjectValidation: Tāuruhia he whakaahuatanga poto mō te take.
new.descriptionPlaceholder: Tēnā koe mō tō āwhina ki a mātou ki te tiaki i tētahi pūnaha tautoko māmā mā te tuku i tētahi tono ia tikiti.
new.descriptionValidation: Tāuruhia he whakaahuatanga taipitopito mō te take.
new.fileNote: Tāpiri: Ko ngā kōnae āhua anake - ngā momo gif/jpeg/png e taea ana.
new.allowAccessLabel: Ka tuku ahau i InterServer ki te uru ki tōku tūmau ā mahia ana ngā whakarerekētanga
new.accessNote: Kia mōhio: Mā te whakatuwhera i tētahi tono tautoko ka hiahia pea InterServer ki te uru, tirotiro, whakatika rānei i ngā kōnae i tō pūkete. Ko tēnei whakahau e hiahiatia ana ki te tuku tautoko hangarau. Haere tonu anake ki te whakaae koe.
new.isRootRestricted: Kei ārai ana te pūtake SSH?
